caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "YOU NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. He is positioned in front of a black microphone on a stand. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white garment, and various pieces of clothing hang on a rack. The room's walls are decorated with numerous small, square framed pictures. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, his facial expressions shifting as he talks. He remains in the same position, but in one instance, he raises his right hand to point with his index finger. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a small white logo is visible, and to the right, there is red text that reads "NO FILTER."
